For Authority For Trustee To Improve Real Property For The Benefit Of Special Needs Beneficiary And For Transfer Brandon Rodney Special Needs Trust To Solano County Superior Court
Off Calendar Nov-19-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Carr for the petitioner.

The Court stated that the delcartion from the trustee in support of the petition had not been received, which Mr. Carr presented. The matter was granted, (Order signed in open court).

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Mizota.

For Authority For Trustee To Improve Real Property For The Benefit Of Special Needs Beneficiary And For Transfer Brandon Rodney Special Needs Trust To Solano County Superior Court
Off Calendar Nov-05-2007 Continued To Nov-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Carr for William Rodney and Jodi Rodney.

Mr. Carr presented a copy of the waiver of notice. The Court questioned how they came up with the $60,000.00 amount. Mr. Carr reported that it was an estimate from a contractor. The Court directed Mr. Carr to obtain a declaration from the bank stating no objection and the contractor's estimate. The matter was continued to November 19, 2007.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Felicia Smith

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Feb-21-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Michael Korbholz appearing for petitioner. John Carr appearing for objector Jodi Rodney. Oral argument presented by both counsel on fees issue. Matter submitted. Court questioned the proper venue of this trust. Mr. Carr stated the successor trustee Well Fargo Bank will petition to change venue to Solano County.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.
